name: token-optimizer
description: Context-window optimization tools (caching, compression, smart file tooling) for the Gemini CLI.

settings.name: Automatic large-read routing
settings.description: Set to true to replace large built-in read results with token-optimizer smart_read results.

settings.name: Large-read threshold in bytes
settings.description: Optional byte threshold for large-read guidance and routing (default 25600).
